mapper.select: SELECT id, customer_name AS customerName, order_id AS orderId, schedule_time AS scheduleTime, scheduler, reimburse_type AS reimburseType, reimburse_count AS reimburseCount, produce_ids AS produceIds, status, reimburse_time AS reimburseTime, reimburser, belong_company AS belongCompany, produce_company AS produceCompany, remark, create_user AS createUser, create_time AS createTime FROM yk_reimburse_record WHERE id = #{id}
